careerRoles.title: Video Breakdown Analyst
careerRoles.subtitle: Game Film Analyst
dailyDuties: Build clips for coaches or media

careerRoles.title: Debate Research Analyst
careerRoles.subtitle: Opinion and Argument Research Analyst
dailyDuties: Track both sides of sports debates

logicHints: If user scores high in confidence and communication, boost roles with public-facing work.
If user is shy or insecure, boost analyst, researcher, coordinator, editor, or support roles before host-facing roles.
If user loves sports betting, boost sportsbook analyst, risk analyst, props analyst, fraud analyst, trading assistant, and betting researcher roles.
If user loves arguing sports points, boost debate producer, research producer, segment producer, sports researcher, and broadcast notes roles.
If user likes money, structure, and stability, boost finance analyst, budget analyst, treasury analyst, audit, and FP&A roles.
